purpose: Day-6 RETROSPECTIVE external validation: pre-registration of the INDEPENDENT ground-truth label set, written BEFORE any label fetch or scoring.
claim_under_test: The calibrated gate's GO/WITHHOLD ranking predicts which scored genes are backed by INDEPENDENT real-world therapeutic evidence (approved drugs / clinical-trial targets for autoimmune indications) BETTER than function-blind baselines (random, OT-association-alone, eQTL-count-alone).
why_external: The pipeline's own Check-A rule was built from {immune-GO, OT_T1D>T2D, GWAS-T2D-tag, measured Treg direction}. It NEVER used drug approval or clinical-trial precedent. Drug/clinical-precedent labels are therefore not constructed by this project's rule => a validation that can fail.
external_truth_source: Open Targets Platform Disease.drugAndClinicalCandidates (known + investigational drugs) for a FIXED, pre-registered set of autoimmune / immune-mediated indications. A scored gene is labelled POSITIVE iff it is the mechanistic target of >=1 such drug meeting the tier threshold.

tier_definitions.tier2_PRIMARY_any_clinical: target of a drug at ANY clinical stage (maxClinicalStage >= 1, i.e. Phase I and above, incl. Approved) for any pre-registered autoimmune indication
tier_definitions.tier1_STRICT_approved_or_late: target of a drug that is Approved OR Phase III+ (maxClinicalStage >= 3) for any pre-registered autoimmune indication

scoring_set: All 44 genes that received a gate GO/WITHHOLD call in day0_checkA_enriched_execution_receipt.json (sha256 25081a891594cbe29d11e2e63dec6dc9c8758074df3241a3b6ce9e49ee730bd1). Includes the trio CD226/RASGRP1/PRKCQ.
sensitivity_set: 35-gene subset excluding the 9 pure-metabolic NOGO-arm distractors (ABCC8,GIPR,HNF4A,IRS1,JAZF1,NOTCH2,PDX1,PPARG,THADA), reported as robustness.

predictors_compared.gate: binary claude_go (GO=1/WITHHOLD=0) from the calibrated gate/adjudication
predictors_compared.ot_alone: OT T1D association score (ot_t1d_assoc) - function-blind continuous baseline
predictors_compared.eqtl_alone: eQTL n_significant count - function-blind continuous baseline

metrics: AUROC (primary) and average precision; bootstrap 95% CI (2000 resamples); DeLong/permutation for gate-vs-OT. Small n acknowledged.

decision_rule.yes: gate AUROC point estimate > best baseline AND gate-vs-best-baseline advantage 95% CI excludes 0
decision_rule.marginal: gate AUROC > best baseline but CI includes 0
decision_rule.underpowered: n_external_positives < 4 OR bootstrap CI so wide no ranking is distinguishable

honesty_note: OT association score is PARTLY informed by the same known-drug datasource, making ot_alone a DELIBERATELY STRONG (conservative) baseline. If the binary gate ties/loses to OT-alone we report that honestly. Labels are frozen with a hash before any AUROC is computed. A NEGATIVE result will be reported as NEGATIVE.
